–1. A mountain in the peninsula east of the Red Sea
  .Also called SINA-HORA
  .The people of Israel arrive at, in their wanderings in the wildernessEx 16:1;19:2;De 1:2
  .The law delivered to Moses uponEx 19:3-25;20;24:12-18;32:15,16;34:2-4;Le 7:38;25:1;26:46;27:34;Nu 3:1;De 4:15;5:26;29:1;33:2;Ne 9:13;Ps 68:8,17;Mal 4:4;Ac 7:30,38
–FIGURATIVEGa 4:24,25
  .SeeHOREB
  .SeeISRAELITES
–2. Wilderness of
  .The people of Israel journeyed inNu 10:12
  .Kept the Passover Festival inNu 9:1-5
  .Counted inNu 26:64
